title: Space Wolves: Scent of a Traitor

curation.synopsis: Ulrik the Slayer, ancient Wolf Priest of the Space Wolves, has run his quarry to ground: a renegade Space Marine the Dark Angels have hunted across the stars. Honour demands that Ulrik hand the prisoner over to the secretive sons of the First Legion — but the captive traitor claims to know the fate of the missing Great Wolf, Logan Grimnar, and dangles that knowledge like bait. To listen is to risk corruption; to refuse may doom his Chapter. As Ulrik weighs his oath against his loyalty to a lost lord, he uncovers something far worse: the sorcerous Thousand Sons stand on the brink of completing a terrible ritual, and only the Space Wolves can stop them in time.

flags.reason: Sources describe the hunt but do not pin a specific named world for this short story; locations left empty rather than invented.
